caption: A man with a smile on his face wears a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt that reads "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK". He is seated in a studio-like setting, speaking into a black professional microphone. Behind him, the wall is decorated with several framed photographs, and a white mannequin wearing a white t-shirt stands to his left. In the background, clothing racks holding various garments are visible. Two logos appear on the screen: one on the bottom left featuring a circular design and "PODCAST", and another on the bottom right that reads "REALLY REALLY TOT". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, subtly shifting his expression and head movement as he continues to smile and speak, while the surrounding environment and equipment remain stationary.
